# Devourer

> Color-to-component generator. Transforms color palettes into production-ready, themed UI components. Supports React (TypeScript), Vue 3 (Composition API), and HTML+CSS. Includes variants, states, accessibility, and type safety.

## What it does

Accepts color palettes (from Hexed or any source) and generates complete themed UI components: buttons, inputs, cards, modals, navigation, tables, badges, and more. Each component includes multiple variants (primary, secondary, outline, ghost), interactive states (hover, active, focus, disabled), size options (xs-xl), WCAG compliance, and TypeScript types.

## Usage

```python
from scripts.color_utils import generate_state_variants, get_contrast_ratio

# Generate hover/active/disabled states from a base color
primary_variants = generate_state_variants('#3B82F6')

# Check accessibility
contrast = get_contrast_ratio('#3B82F6', '#FFFFFF')
```

## Component categories

- Interactive: Button, Input, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, Slider
- Container: Card, Modal, Panel, Alert, Toast
- Navigation: NavBar, Tabs, Breadcrumb, Pagination
- Data Display: Table, Badge, Avatar, Progress

## Frameworks

- React (TypeScript): Functional components, hooks, ref forwarding, proper event handler typing
- Vue 3 (Composition API): `<script setup>`, TypeScript interfaces, emits/props typing
- HTML + CSS: Semantic HTML, CSS custom properties, BEM naming

## Part of a suite

Hexed (colors) + Specimen (typography) + Gridlock (layout) + Eyes Peeled (accessibility) + Devourer (components)

Devourer is the final step: it consumes outputs from all other skills and produces production-ready components.
